GUARDIAN-BAALORS_LORDLY_PLATE.title: Baalor's Lordly Plate
GUARDIAN-BAALORS_LORDLY_PLATE.flavor: One can never have enough armor.
GUARDIAN-BOTTLED_BLACK_HOLE.title: Bottled Black Hole
GUARDIAN-BOTTLED_BLACK_HOLE.description: On pickup, Enchant a card with [purple]Temporal[/purple].
GUARDIAN-BOTTLED_BLACK_HOLE.flavor: Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known.
GUARDIAN-BRONZE_GEAR.title: Bronze Gear
GUARDIAN-BRONZE_GEAR.description: At the start of each combat, gain [gold]Gear Up[/gold]. Guardian starts the run with a random common [gold]Gem[/gold].
GUARDIAN-BRONZE_GEAR.flavor: Protection where you need it most.
GUARDIAN-CRYO_CHAMBER.title: Cryo Chamber
GUARDIAN-CRYO_CHAMBER.description: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Stasis[/gold] slot. Whenever a card enters [gold]Stasis[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it for the remainder of combat.
GUARDIAN-CRYO_CHAMBER.flavor: Things always seem better coming out than they did going in.
GUARDIAN-GUARDIAN_GEAR.title: Guardian Gear
GUARDIAN-GUARDIAN_GEAR.description: At the start of combat, gain [gold]Gear Up[/gold]. Whenever you enter Defensive Mode, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw 2 cards.
GUARDIAN-OBSIDIAN_SCALES.title: Obsidian Scales
GUARDIAN-OBSIDIAN_SCALES.description: At the start of combat, gain 3 Thorns. Whenever you are debuffed or gain a debuff, gain 1 Thorns.
GUARDIAN-OBSIDIAN_SCALES.flavor: Stain the sky black with your blood. Retaliate against all who struck out at you.
GUARDIAN-PICK_OF_RHAPSODY.title: Pick of Rhapsody
GUARDIAN-PICK_OF_RHAPSODY.description: Whenever you defeat an Elite encounter, add a random [gold]Gem[/gold] to the rewards.
GUARDIAN-PICK_OF_RHAPSODY.flavor: With as many gemstones that litter the Spire, it is hard to imagine anyone so unlucky to have needed this Pick to aid them.
GUARDIAN-PILOTS_CODEX.title: Pilot's Codex
GUARDIAN-PILOTS_CODEX.description: Start combat with [blue]2[/blue] random cards in [gold]Stasis[/gold].
GUARDIAN-PILOTS_CODEX.flavor: Designs and diagrams of the Spire's earliest manually-driven prototypes, by Master Pilot David.
GUARDIAN-QUANTUM_CHAMBER.title: Quantum Chamber
GUARDIAN-QUANTUM_CHAMBER.description: The first time you put a card into [gold]Stasis[/gold] each turn, [gold]Accelerate[/gold] it.
GUARDIAN-QUANTUM_CHAMBER.flavor: You get the chicken by hatching the egg, not by smashing it.
GUARDIAN-SACK_OF_GEMS.title: Sack of Gems
GUARDIAN-SACK_OF_GEMS.description: Upon pickup, you may choose up to 5 random Gems to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
GUARDIAN-WANDER_BOTS.title: Wander Bots
GUARDIAN-WANDER_BOTS.description: At the start of each combat, lose 1 [gold]Stasis[/gold] slot. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of your turn.
GUARDIAN-WANDER_BOTS.flavor: These drones find the most wonderful salvage, but require processing power to maintain.
